experiment_title: 验证二氧化锰对过氧化氢分解的催化作用

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="验证二氧化锰对过氧化氢分解的催化作用" goal="通过对比实验，观察二氧化锰对过氧化氢分解产生氧气的催化效果" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder_1" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="10 mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20 mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_1" type="test_tube_holder" />
      <Component id="spatula_1" type="spatula" />
      <Component id="glowing_wooden_stick_1" type="wooden_stick" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="H2O2_5percent_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="MnO2_powder" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O2" volume="5 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="5 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_holder_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="glowing_wooden_stick_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="MnO2" mass="0.1 g" tool="spatula_1" id="step_5" />
      <Insert tool="glowing_wooden_stick_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O2" volume="5 mL" id="step_8" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="5 mL" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="glowing_wooden_stick_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_11" />
      
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备对照实验：量取过氧化氢溶液，转移至试管并固定，插入木条观察未加催化剂时的反应。
向试管中加入二氧化锰，插入木条并观察催化剂作用下的反应。
重复对照实验：重新量取过氧化氢溶液，转移至试管，插入木条观察未加催化剂时的反应。
